parameters: I have no reason to go into the infirmary.
Fueh~... Apparently we'll be in for supplementary lessons if we don't write the report....
Somehow your grades are completely fine... I'm jealous.
How are your grades so normal when you sleep during class all day....
Are you getting personal lessons from that childhood friend of yours!? Fuck~!

Honestly, even supplementary lessons would be tolerable if there was a cute girl 
next to me...
Hey, does Kurumizawa for real have an older sister? No cap?
I'd be more motivated to study if I had a sexy personal tutor too....
I'll prove it to you all, that you can be popular even if your brain doesn't work...
アニメーションタイプ = def
Oi oi... who the hell is that absolute beauty...
You're telling me that an [ideal beauty] like her seriously exists?
Fueh~... Apparently we'll be in for supplementary lessons if we don't write the report....
Somehow your grades are completely fine... I'm jealous.
How are your grades so normal when you sleep during class all day....
Are you getting personal lessons from that childhood friend of yours!? Fuck~!

Honestly, even supplementary lessons would be tolerable if there was a cute girl 
next to me...
Hey, does Kurumizawa for real have an older sister? No cap?
I'd be more motivated to study if I had a sexy personal tutor too....
I'll prove it to you all, that you can be popular even if your brain doesn't work...
Even though they're free days, I still can't help but come to class anyway...
Summer vacation really brings out all the couples, doesn't it~?
...Though, seems like there's a few that form even before that?
I already knew it, of course, but Kurumizawa-san's seriously popular, huh...
You're probably hated by all the boys here, you know? Try not to get jumped, okay?

I'd sure love to experience the sort of love that makes my heart jump out of my throat, 
figuratively and literally~
I wonder if there's a classy old man out there for me~...
Forget the shoe locker of the girl of my dreams, I can't even find my own.
Should I just go home barefoot? Or wear someone else's shoes....
I'm starting to like the smell of all these shoe lockers, not gonna lie....

People are gonna start taking me for the sort of guy that always hangs around shoe lockers, 
which I am.
I've seen a whole lot of people go through here. Which one's mine?
Alright, let's write a book someday. I'll call it [The Shoe Locker: My story].
This one!? No, this one!? ....Not this one either.
Well well, if it ain't Mr Enviable No 1~
Then again, it was clear to just about everyone just how much she loves you~
Man, I wanna get a girlfriend to spend summer with too...
I got a part time job, to pay for full body hair removal!
There's nothing I really gotta do here but, well, where else will I go to meet girls anyway?
Now that Kurumizawa's been taken... is the next battle gonna be for that PrettyGal?
You know, gender's starting to matter to me less and less, as long as they're cute, really...
Go outside? (Return to the World Map)
完了までウェイト = true
Go outside? (Return to the World Map)
完了までウェイト = true
アニメーションタイプ = def
\sa[123]\SE[10]Huh? You sure you don't need to get going?
I'm planning on doing just that
Nevermind, let's go home together (Afternoon -> Night)
I'm planning on doing just that
I'll go home first then, see you later~
Nevermind, let's go home together (Afternoon -> Night)
\sa[124]\SE[2]I see I see. Then, if you've got nothing to do, want to walk home together?
I actually do have something to take care of...
Sure, let's walk home together (Afternoon -> Night)
I actually do have something to take care of...
I'll go home first then, see you later~
Sure, let's walk home together (Afternoon -> Night)
We've still got loads of time, want to go somewhere?
\SE[13]Let's just go wherever we feel like as we walk home.
We could also go straight home and play some games in my room~
アニメーションタイプ = def
\SE[6]Reminds me, did you remember to have breakfast this morning?
Both you and uncle always end up skipping breakfast...
You'll end up ruining your body at this rate, I'd really rather that you ate well every morning~
\SE[55]I wouldn't mind making it for you myself but, even I don't
have that much free time in the mornings so...
\SE[42]If only a certain someone could wake up early in the morning and
come have breakfast at my place, but no way that's happening, right~?
Was this place always this empty or what?
Just as she said, there's normally quite a few people here,
at this construction site on our way home from school.
For some reason though, there's nobody here today but us. Because of that,
I couldn't help but find our usual road to school somehow special.
...Realizing the fact that there really might only be the
two of us here, I felt my heart start racing.
After scratching my head to hide the sound of my pounding heart,
I suddenly touched Shino's hand with my own.
Unable to look Shino directly in the eye as she begged for something,
I turned my face away and summoned up my courage... and firmly held her hand.
While wishing desperately for her warm hand grasping my own
to not notice my nervousness, I slowly started walking.
\SE[33]Hey, until we come across other people again... could we stay like this?
It was all I could do to spit out a curt [...Sure, whatever].
And so we both slowly set off on the road home, together.
In the end, our entwined hands didn't let each other go even as we came across several

people, right up until she found and picked up a four leafed clover in front of our apartment 
building.
(You can now view the related flashback event from your home computer)
スライドスピード = def

Just as she said, there's normally quite a few people here,
at this construction site on our way home from school.
For some reason though, there's nobody here today but us. Because of that,
I couldn't help but find our usual road to school somehow special.
...Realizing the fact that there really might only be the
two of us here, I felt my heart start racing.
After scratching my head to hide the sound of my pounding heart,
I suddenly touched Shino's hand with my own.

I turned my face away and summoned up my courage... and firmly held her hand.
While wishing desperately for her warm hand grasping my own
to not notice my nervousness, I slowly started walking.

And so we both slowly set off on the road home, together.

スライドスピード = def
\SM[jump]\SE[10]Yaho~, \n[1]♪ Are you about to go home too?
\SE[24]Fufuh--, how about we do it together then, mister?
\SE[33-nb]Fufuh--, do as you see fit~♪ I'll allow you the right to
...We set off on the road home together, as I stared at this happy-go-lucky girl's face.
\sa[123]\SE[18]Hm?~ What's up~? Is there something on my face?
[I dunno, you look like you're enjoying yourself], I replied, and
it only made her cheer even more obvious. She turned that blinding smile
towards me. She almost looked like a flower in bloom.
\se[34-nb]Fufuh--, you could tell, huh? That's my (tentative)
\SE[24]I'm enjoying myself because good stuff happened~, fuhnfuhn~♪
Can you tell what it was~? Fufuh--, I bet you can't~
Thinking that it'd be pointless to bother considering I had
absolutely no idea, I just asked her directly.
\SE[33-nb]You see, fufuh~.... it's happening even now.
I tilted my head, not understanding the meaning of her words.
\SE[27]Eheheh, it's okay, you don't need to. \SM[slidef]...There--
Suddenly, a warm sensation enveloped my right hand, and
when I looked to see with, it was Shino's hand on my own.
She laughed, as if a child caught red-handed doing a prank.
...Instead of replying to her, I just tightened my grip.
\sa[127]\SE[54-nb]Wah. Ehehehe. Even more good stuff happened.
...After that, neither of us opened our mouths, and instead
we just walked home while soaking in each other's warmth.
スライドスピード = def
\SM[double]\se[28-nb]What should I do on our way home today~? Fuhnfuhnfufuhn~♪
\se[31-nb]I've already stocked up our pantry so I can strike off the supermarket....
Being this free actually makes it hard to decide, you know~? Fufuhnfuhn~♪
\se[14-nb]The videogame store, the cafe, the convenience store...
Ah, I could ask \n[1] to come with me. I wonder what he's doing~
[I'm in the hallway, I guess], I sent a RIME to her.
She, who'd just taken out her phone, saw the message, turned
around and went red from ear to ear.
\sa[131]\SM[tremble]\se[56-nb]Heeeeyyyy~~! If you were there then you could have just told meeee~~!
\se[55-nb]Did you hear all of that just now...?
[You were humming a nice and cheery tune], I sent a RIME to her.
\sa[131]\SM[tremble]\se[56-nb]I can't anymoreee~~! I'm mad, very mad! Okottandesu!
...After that, it took 2 lattes, 3 convenience store snacks, and
2 cans of juice to cheer her back up.
Despite my lighter wallet, she'd returned to her happy self so it's fine.
...It is what it is, after all.
スライドスピード = def
アニメーションタイプ = def
スライドスピード = def
\SM[nod]\SE[1]How nostalgic~. The scratches on this wall, are the same as back then...
I saw Rino nee-san, coming out of the staff room and looking around nostalgically.
...Come to think of it, she also went to this school, same as us, huh?
What are you doing here... is something you should be asking me for once, huh?
\SE[10]It seems like the admins here want to put interviews? of us alumni
into the school's reading materials, and there's lots of us at the company
I work at, so I came here as the rep. Ehem~.
She puffed out her chest proudly while telling me about it.
Considering she graduated with top grades, it's only natural
for her to be selected for something like that.
Once again, I got a glimpse of the absolute level of my childhood friend's sister.
Perfect people really do exist, huh? (As long as you ignore her love for booze)
\SE[21-nb]The one who took care of me back then was my homeroom teacher, and...
she'd been holding onto something I forgot here back then, and finally returned it to me~
\sa[135]\SE[19-nb]It's not something I need anymore, and maybe it's fate at
work that we met here, and it'd honestly be annoying to carry back...
so I'll give it to you~♥
Received [Rino's glasses from her school days].
(You can now view the related flashback event from your home computer)
\sa[133]\SE[11]Fufuh--, think of me whenever you see these, okay?
Her jokes aside, they do distinctly remind me of the way she
was back in her school days, when I look at them.
\sa[135]\SE[1]Hey, \n[2]. Do you still have some time?
I don't have to go back to the office just yet, you see.
\SE[23-nb]Do you mind showing me around the school? Fufuh--, I don't
get to come back here much, so I want to look around and reminisce a bit.
And so I replied with [Of course, I don't mind]
Well then, could you... guide me around?
After that, we toured the various parts of the school.
She seemed to enjoy it a lot, reminiscing about her school days the whole time.
While getting showered in the curious and awe filled looks from the
passing students, we enjoyed our little school date (?) together.
スライドスピード = def

\SE[2]Yes--, thank you. Do excuse me then~.
\SE[9]Ahahah, not at all. I still have a long way to go compared to her~.
But thank you very much, it makes me very happy!
アニメーションタイプ = def
\se[12]\SA[123]Huh, I can't believe I'm seeing you at school this early in the day...
\sa[130]\SE[8]I'm joking, I'm joking. Don't get mad. I was just trying to tease you~.
\SM[double]\se[31-nb]I just submitted the report to sensei, and she said that I've
got a good head on my shoulders, just like onee-chan~!
\se[14-nb]Fufuh--, she used to be onee-chan's homeroom teacher
back in her school days, so I'm really happy to hear that from her~
That's probably the best compliment that she could ever have received.
Rino nee-san is someone she's always looked up to.
\SE[33-nb]With that, all my tasks for today are complete~!
\n[1], do your best too~. Shino-san's cheering you on~, eheheh♪
...I thought about just following her but, suddenly the feeling
that I should also do my best suddenly grew inside me, and
so I saw her off and went to class instead.

...I gotta do my best, to get even a step closer to my ridiculously hardworking childhood 
friend.
スライドスピード = def
Even though it's free attendance, there's still a whole lot of students, huh~?
Yo, Mr Celeb! How's it feel to win over Kurumizawa?
Your childhood friend, huh~? Must be nice, if only I had someone like that too~
Seems like this area's sealed off for construction until the end of summer~
The girls at our school are really top class, aren't they~?
Especially our class, with Shino and PrettyGal, no?
I'm gonna get myself a boyfriend for sure this year~~!
Have you ever studied in the library? I for one haven't~
You don't look very self-assertive, but your face isn't half bad~
